title: Lesson 33
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: to close something with a key or code
words.example: Please lock the door when you leave.

words.meaning: to send a letter or package
words.example: I will mail the form tomorrow.
Mix the eggs with the flour.

words.meaning: to say that you will give or do something
words.example: The hotel will offer free breakfast.

words.meaning: to cover something with color using paint
words.example: We will paint the classroom wall blue.

words.meaning: to make liquid flow from one container to another
words.example: Pour the water into the glass slowly.

words.meaning: to keep someone or something safe
words.example: A helmet can protect your head.

words.meaning: to say or do something again
words.example: Could you repeat the question, please?

words.meaning: to stop working or moving in order to relax
words.example: You should rest after the long walk.

words.meaning: to travel on a bike, horse, bus, or other vehicle
words.example: I ride my bicycle to school.
